name: Central Library
description: Located on the 2nd floor near the Admin Block. Serves as the primary academic resource center for the university.

name: Canteen
description: Ground floor canteen situated near the playground and in front of the Basketball Court.

name: Volleyball Court
description: Outdoor volleyball court located beside the Information Technology Building.

name: Basketball Court
description: Outdoor basketball court situated in front of the Canteen and beside the Boys Hostel.

name: Mess
description: Multi-floor facility near the Futsal Turf and beside the Boys Gymnasium, at the backyard of the Boys Hostel. Ground floor houses table tennis, carrom, and the boys gym; first floor has a badminton court.

name: Boys Gymnasium
description: Located behind the Boys Hostel. Shares the building with the Mess. Ground floor includes gym equipment, table tennis, and carrom; first floor features a badminton court.

name: Pickleball Court
description: Outdoor pickleball court beside the Futsal Turf, near the Boys Hostel and parking area.

name: Playing Ground
description: Open playing ground behind the Electronics and Electrical Science Building. Serves as the primary venue for the annual Pratishruti cultural event.

name: OAT
description: Open Air Theatre located between the Electronics and Electrical Science Building and the Applied Science Building. Used for outdoor events, performances, and gatherings.

name: Amul Outlet
description: Amul franchise outlet situated in front of the Electronics and Electrical Science Building.

name: Snackify
description: Snackify outlet in front of the Information Technology Building, beside the Applied Science Building.

name: Information Technology Building
description: Academic block for the IT department, situated in front of Digital Tower and near the Volleyball Court. Classrooms span all floors; dedicated computer labs are on the 2nd floor.

name: Digital Tower
description: Prominent 10-floor academic tower in front of the IT Building and near Snackify. Houses labs and classrooms from the underground level through all 10 floors, with the parking floor excluded from academic use.

name: MBA Building
description: Management school building situated in front of the Central Library, near the main entrance of Ramdeobaba University. Hosts the MBA Auditorium on the 1st floor and a dedicated library on the 2nd floor.

name: Novelty
description: General store / outlet situated directly beside the MBA Building and near the Digital Tower parking area.

name: Electronics and Electrical Science Building
description: Academic block for the Electronics and Electrical Science department. Located near the EN Playing Ground, in front of the Amul Outlet, and beside the OAT. Equipped with labs and classrooms on every floor; the EN Auditorium is on the 3rd floor.

name: Boys Hostel
description: Primary residential facility for male students. Situated in front of the MCA Building, positioned between the Volleyball Court, Pickleball Court, and Futsal Turf. Equipped with all standard hostel amenities; the Mess and Boys Gymnasium are located in the adjacent building at the backyard.

name: MCA Building
description: Academic block for the MCA (Master of Computer Applications) department. Located near the parking area and Volleyball Court, beside the Playing Ground, and directly in front of the Boys Hostel.
